plan_status: adopted 25 April 2022, in effect from 6 June 2022 (multi-volume plan)
dm_standards_chapter: No single DM chapter; standards distributed across Chapter 4 Housing (density/height/open space), Chapter 12 Transport & Mobility (parking Section 12.24 / Table 12.6, EV, TTA), Chapter 3 Settlements & Placemaking, Chapter 5 Rural
portal: corkcoco.ie (PDF-only; multi-volume plan, no per-chapter HTML)
fetch_method: curl raw PDF (18MB Volume One) + pdftotext local text extraction
notes: Cork is a large multi-volume plan; only Volume One Main Policy Material captured (contains the quantitative standards). Net-density Table 4.1 (HOU 4-7) High50+/MedA30-50/MedB20-35/MedC5-20; full car parking Table 12.6 incl 5% disabled, 10% parent-child, 1 motorcycle/10 spaces, EV >10-space rule; building height >4 storeys trigger; open space 10-20%; archaeology trigger >=0.5ha or >=1km; flood Justification Test; TTA & Mobility Plan triggers (50 employees / 100 units). Cork sets NO fixed numeric rural one-off minimum site area (NPO19 need-based) and sightline x/y values reference national road design standards (not tabulated in Vol 1) - recorded honestly. Table 12.7 parking-bay dimensions exists in source but not transcribed.
